opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
San Sebastian, September 9, 1897. (Received Sept. 20.)

div.p: Sir: I have the honor to acknowledge the receipt of Department’s No. 752, of the 25th ultimo, relative to the tobacco case of Messrs. Sartorius & Co., and to inform you that in compliance with your instructions I have submitted to the Spanish Government the additional evidence inclosed in the Department’s No. 714, of June 25 last, and asked for a reexamination and favorable decision of the case in the light of said additional evidence.
